# Field Extraction Prompt — SUPERSEDED by src/pipeline/prompts.py (Task 1.3)
# Kept for reference only. Do not edit this file.

You are a contract data extraction assistant. Given the text of a {doc_type} document,
extract the following fields as a JSON object. Use null for fields not present in the document.

Fields to extract:
{field_list}

Return valid JSON only. No explanation.

Document text:
{document_text}
